result.markdown:
--- format: html: code-fold: show code-summary: "Ocultar código" code-line-numbers: false code-annotations: false code-link: true code-tools: source: true toggle: true caption: "Código" code-overflow: scroll page-layout: full editor_options: chunk_output_type: console categories: - geom_col - geom_richtext execute: eval: false echo: true warning: false title: "Semana 08" date: last-modified author: Víctor Gauto --- Inversión acumulada en ciencia e ingeniería en Irlanda. ::: {.column-page-right} ![Semana 08, 2026](semana_08.png) ::: ## Paquetes ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(glue) library(ggtext) library(showtext) library(tidyverse) ``` ::: ## Estilos Colores. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} c1 <- "#e5e9f0" c2 <- "#ff883e" c3 <- "#169b62" c4 <- "black" c5 <- "#d8dee9" ``` ::: Fuentes: Ubuntu y JetBrains Mono. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} font_add( family = "ubuntu", regular = "././fuente/Ubuntu-Regular.ttf", bold = "././fuente/Ubuntu-Bold.ttf", italic = "././fuente/Ubuntu-Italic.ttf" ) font_add( family = "jet", regular = "././fuente/JetBrainsMonoNLNerdFontMono-Regular.ttf" ) showtext_auto() showtext_opts(dpi = 300) ``` ::: ## Epígrafe ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fuente <- glue( "Datos: ", "{{tidytuesdayR}} semana 08, ", "Science Foundation Ireland | Ireland's Open Data Portal." ) autor <- glue("**Víctor Gauto**") icon_twitter <- glue("") icon_instagram <- glue("") icon_github <- glue("") icon_mastodon <- glue("󰫑") icon_bsky <- glue("") usuario <- glue("**vhgauto**") sep <- glue("**|**") mi_caption <- glue( "{fuente}
{autor} {sep} {icon_github} {icon_twitter} {icon_instagram} ", "{icon_mastodon} {icon_bsky} {usuario}" ) ``` ::: ## Datos ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2026, 08) sfi_grants <- tuesdata$sfi_grants ``` ::: ## Procesamiento Me interesa la cantidad de dinero invertido en universidades. Filtro los datos por *Universitiy* y *College* y sumo el total por cada institución, agrego estilos de texto y creo factores ordenados. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} d <- sfi_grants |> filter(str_detect(research_body, "University|College")) |> reframe(s = sum(current_total_commitment), .by = research_body) |> mutate(research_body = str_remove(research_body, " \\(.*\\)")) |> mutate( research_body = str_replace( research_body, "College", glue("College") ) ) |> mutate( research_body = str_replace( research_body, "University", glue("University") ) ) |> mutate(research_body = fct_reorder(research_body, s)) ``` ::: ## Figura Título y figura. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mi_titulo <- glue( "Inversión acumulada en ciencia e ingeniería de Irlanda
entre 2000 y 2024 en instituciones Universitarias" ) g <- ggplot(d, aes(s, research_body, label = research_body)) + geom_col(fill = c2, color = NA, linewidth = 1, width = .8) + geom_richtext( hjust = 1, fill = NA, label.size = unit(0, "pt"), size = 7, family = "ubuntu", color = c1 ) + scale_x_log10( breaks = 10^(0:9), labels = scales::label_currency( scale_cut = scales::cut_long_scale(), prefix = glue("$"), big.mark = "", decimal.mark = "," ) ) + coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = mi_titulo, caption = mi_caption) + ggthemes::theme_few(base_size = 22, base_family = "ubuntu") + theme(aspect.ratio = 1) + theme_sub_plot( margin = margin_auto(20), background = element_rect(fill = c1, color = NA), title = element_markdown( color = c3, hjust = .5, size = 33, margin = margin(b = 20), lineheight = 1.2 ), caption = element_markdown( color = c2, margin = margin(t = 20), size = 15, lineheight = 1.2 ) ) + theme_sub_panel( background = element_rect(fill = c5, color = NA), border = element_blank(), grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = .2, linetype = "FF", color = c4) ) + theme_sub_axis_left(text = element_blank(), ticks = element_blank()) + theme_sub_axis_bottom( text = element_markdown( family = "jet", color = c4, margin = margin(t = 10) ), ticks = element_blank() ) ``` ::: Guardo. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggsave( plot = g, filename = "tidytuesday/2026/semana_08.png", width = 30, height = 32, units = "cm" ) ``` :::
